behavior: ProofSurface renders a [ 06 / ... ] section with >=3 GitHub metrics (repos, stars, top languages) + hive metric, fetched at build time and baked into dist for both locales
verification: cd site && npx astro build && grep -o 'data-proof' dist/index.html | head -1 && grep -o 'data-proof' dist/es/index.html | head -1

behavior: A build-time GitHub fetch failure degrades to the hardcoded FALLBACK and astro build still completes; astro check passes 0/0/0
verification: cd site && npx astro check && echo 'force-failure smoke: set an unreachable API base and confirm build completes on FALLBACK'

behavior: Proof-surface labels are localized per locale (EN vs ES) while the numeric values are identical across both bands
verification: cd site && npx astro build && test $(grep -o 'data-stat' dist/index.html | wc -l) -ge 3 && test $(grep -o 'data-stat' dist/es/index.html | wc -l) -ge 3
